serviceDescription: Amazon WorkSpaces is a managed, secure cloud desktop service. You can use Amazon WorkSpaces to provision either Windows or Linux desktops in just a few minutes and quickly scale to provide thousands of desktops to workers across the globe.

row.label: Billing option
row.description: Pay per month (730 hours) for always-on functionality or select hourly billing for on-demand usage

components.label: Additional storage
components.description: Maximum total storage available per WorkSpace is 2TB. Thus, the maximum additional storage that may be added is 2TB less the sum of the selected root and user volume storage configurations.

meteredUnit.allRegions: Bundle Storage License Root Volume Usage 0 GB
